---
title: "02 — Data Preprocessing"
format: html
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
root_dir <- if (file.exists("data/raw")) "." else ".."
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(root_dir))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```



## Load cleaned EDA data

```{r load-eda}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)

eda_path <- "data/processed/eda_data.rds"
if (!file.exists(eda_path)) {
  stop("EDA data not found. Run R/01_eda.qmd first.")
}

eda_data <- readRDS(eda_path)
```



## Drop IDs, low-information predictors, and death/hospice rows

```{r feature-selection}
death_hospice_ids <- c(11, 13, 14, 19, 20, 21)

drop_cols <- c(
  "encounter_id",
  "patient_nbr",
  "readmitted",
  "weight",
  "max_glu_serum",
  "A1Cresult"
)

model_data <- eda_data |>
  filter(!discharge_disposition_id %in% death_hospice_ids) |>
  select(-any_of(drop_cols)) |>
  mutate(
    readmit_30 = factor(readmit_30, levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    across(where(is.character), as.factor)
  ) |>
  distinct()

cat("Excluded death/hospice rows:", sum(eda_data$discharge_disposition_id %in% death_hospice_ids), "\n")
cat("Modeling rows:", nrow(model_data), "\n")
cat("Predictors:", ncol(model_data) - 1, "\n")
```



## Stratified train validation test split

```{r split}
set.seed(503)

train_val_idx <- createDataPartition(model_data$readmit_30, p = 0.75, list = FALSE)
train_val <- model_data[train_val_idx, ]
test_data <- model_data[-train_val_idx, ]

train_idx <- createDataPartition(train_val$readmit_30, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_data <- train_val[train_idx, ]
val_data <- train_val[-train_idx, ]

split_summary <- tibble(
  split = c("Train", "Validation", "Test"),
  n = c(nrow(train_data), nrow(val_data), nrow(test_data)),
  readmit_rate = c(
    mean(train_data$readmit_30 == "Yes"),
    mean(val_data$readmit_30 == "Yes"),
    mean(test_data$readmit_30 == "Yes")
  )
) |>
  mutate(readmit_rate = scales::percent(readmit_rate, accuracy = 0.1))

split_summary
```
